mapper.select: SELECT f.fleet_id, f.fleet_name, f.captain_id, f.create_time, d.name AS captain_name FROM fleet f LEFT JOIN driver d ON f.captain_id = d.driver_id WHERE f.fleet_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fleet (fleet_name, captain_id, create_time) VALUES (#{fleetName}, #{captainId}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT f.fleet_id, f.fleet_name, f.captain_id, f.create_time, d.name AS captain_name FROM fleet f LEFT JOIN driver d ON f.captain_id = d.driver_id
